post.description:
Authenticate with email + password, returning JWT tokens.

The access token is also set as an httpOnly cookie for browser clients.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh pair.

Revoke the current access token and clear the cookie.

Server-side revocation (jti denylist) means a bearer token presented after
logout is rejected for its remaining lifetime, instead of staying valid
until it naturally expires. The denylist TTL equals the token's remaining
life so the entry self-expires (no unbounded growth).

get.description:
List campaigns with pagination and optional filters.

Uses a single query with a correlated subquery for asset counts
to avoid N+1 query overhead.

post.description: Create a new campaign and queue a generation job.

get.description: Return detailed information about a single campaign.

patch.description: Update a campaign (only allowed while it is in *draft* status).

post.description: Queue a new generation job for an existing campaign.

get.description: List assets belonging to a campaign, with optional filtering.
Return metadata for a single asset.

Download the actual asset file.

For local storage this streams the file via ``FileResponse``.
For S3 storage this redirects to a presigned URL.
List all brand guideline entries with pagination.

post.description:
Create a new brand guideline entry.

Optionally upload a brand guidelines document (PDF, DOCX, YAML) which
will be parsed and its extracted values stored as ``raw_extracted_data``.

get.description: Return detail for a single brand guideline entry.

patch.description: Update overrides on an existing brand guideline entry.

delete.description: Delete a brand guideline entry (Admin only).

get.description: Return the latest compliance report for a campaign, or null if none exists.

post.description: Execute a compliance check against campaign content and store the report.

Approve a compliance report that has warnings.

Only reports that are non-compliant or have violations can be approved.
This overrides ``is_compliant`` to ``True`` and records approval notes
in the summary.

get.description: List jobs with pagination and optional filters.
Return the current status of a single job.

post.description: Cancel a queued or running job.

get.description:
Return metrics for a single campaign.

Aggregates asset counts by locale and aspect ratio, plus timing and
compliance data from the campaign's job and compliance report records.
Return available image-generation backends and their status.

CampaignCreateRequest.title: CampaignCreateRequest
CampaignCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a new campaign.

CampaignResponse.title: CampaignResponse
CampaignResponse.description: Full campaign representation returned by the API.

CampaignUpdateRequest.title: CampaignUpdateRequest
CampaignUpdateRequest.description: Partial-update payload for an existing campaign (draft only).
